name: Mistral AI MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Mistral AI — the European open-weight and commercial LLM provider. Enables AI agents to call Mistral models (Mistral Large, Mistral Small, Codestral, Mixtral) for text generation, code completion, and embeddings. Useful for European data-residency requirements where US-based AI providers may be restricted.
use_cases: Generating text with European-hosted AI models from data-sovereign agents
Code generation and completion using Codestral from developer tool agents
Creating embeddings for RAG pipelines from knowledge base agents
Multi-agent workflows using Mistral function calling from orchestration agents
not_for: Use cases requiring HIPAA-compliant AI processing (check Mistral's BAA policy)
Real-time streaming at very low latency (<100ms requirements)
best_when: A European company or data-sovereign use case wants LLM capabilities with EU data processing — Mistral's models are hosted in Europe and GDPR-compliant.
avoid_when: You need multimodal AI (vision, audio) or already have OpenAI/Anthropic contracts. FINANCIAL RISK: LLM API costs scale with usage — monitor token consumption.

auth.notes: Mistral API key authentication. Keys generated in Mistral La Plateforme console. Separate keys for testing and production recommended.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial credits on signup; generous experimentation tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Per token pricing: Mistral Small ($0.20/1M input), Mistral Large ($2/1M input), Codestral ($0.20/1M input)
pricing.notes: Pay-as-you-go pricing. Free tier with generous limits for experimentation. EU-hosted infrastructure.

performance.rate_limits: Mistral API: rate limits by tier; 5 req/sec on free tier, higher on paid

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: LLM API costs scale with token usage — implement usage limits
Mistral model capabilities evolve rapidly — pin model versions for stability
EU data residency is a feature but means higher latency for non-EU users
Function calling syntax differs slightly from OpenAI — verify compatibility
Community MCP implementation — verify against latest Mistral API version
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: API usage costs scale with agent token consumption. GDPR-compliant EU hosting. API key must be secured. Monitor for prompt injection attacks.

security_score_components.security_notes: EU-hosted LLM. GDPR-compliant. Data processed in EU. API key security and prompt injection prevention required.
